testcase.name: test_admin_role_full_access_on_new_keys

failure.message: AssertionError: Admin role missing backfilled key: platform_admin assert 'platform_admin' in {'account_gop_metrics': {'create': True, 'delete': True, 'edit': True, 'view': True}, 'accounting_employees': {'create': True, 'delete': True, 'edit': True, 'view': True}, 'accounting_income_masters': {'create': True, 'delete': True, 'edit': True, 'view': True}, 'accounting_masters': {'create': True, 'delete': True, 'edit': True, 'view': True}, ...}

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration_318_rbac_unification.py:152: in test_admin_role_full_access_on_new_keys assert key in perms, f"Admin role missing backfilled key: {key}" E AssertionError: Admin role missing backfilled key: platform_admin E assert 'platform_admin' in {'account_gop_metrics': {'create': True, 'delete': True, 'edit': True, 'view': True}, 'accounting_employees': {'create': True, 'delete': True, 'edit': True, 'view': True}, 'accounting_income_masters': {'create': True, 'delete': True, 'edit': True, 'view': True}, 'accounting_masters': {'create': True, 'delete': True, 'edit': True, 'view': True}, ...}

testcase.name: test_non_admin_role_has_all_new_keys

failure.message: AssertionError: Role 'Creative Director' missing new keys: ['platform_admin'] assert not ['platform_admin']

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration_318_rbac_unification.py:168: in test_non_admin_role_has_all_new_keys assert not missing, f"Role '{role['name']}' missing new keys: {missing}" E AssertionError: Role 'Creative Director' missing new keys: ['platform_admin'] E assert not ['platform_admin']

testcase.name: test_all_roles_have_every_category_key

failure.message: AssertionError: Role 'Admin' missing keys after backfill: ['platform_admin'] assert not {'platform_admin'}

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration_318_rbac_unification.py:177: in test_all_roles_have_every_category_key assert not missing, f"Role '{role['name']}' missing keys after backfill: {sorted(missing)}" E AssertionError: Role 'Admin' missing keys after backfill: ['platform_admin'] E assert not {'platform_admin'}

testcase.name: test_roles_have_expected_fields

failure.message: AssertionError: Role missing field 'is_system_role': Creative Director assert 'is_system_role' in {'created_at': '2026-07-06T08:23:22.771359+00:00', 'description': 'Test role', 'dr_rename_migrated': True, 'id': 'b9d22666-669c-4f5d-9b74-dafab5de0896', ...}

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration_318_rbac_unification.py:195: in test_roles_have_expected_fields assert f in role, f"Role missing field '{f}': {role.get('name')}" E AssertionError: Role missing field 'is_system_role': Creative Director E assert 'is_system_role' in {'created_at': '2026-07-06T08:23:22.771359+00:00', 'description': 'Test role', 'dr_rename_migrated': True, 'id': 'b9d22666-669c-4f5d-9b74-dafab5de0896', ...}
